name: Western Union
description_short: At 249 Visitacion Ave in Brisbane, CA 94005, Western Union operates as a credit union. Contact them at +1 415-467-1424.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma. The institution was founded to serve the community with friendly, professional financial services and has expanded to multiple branch locations across the Tulsa area, including Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa.

WSFCU offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles), boat loans, checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, money market accounts, and mortgage lending. Their flagship product is the Kasasa Cash Back Checking account, which provides 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle when qualification requirements are met. Current promotional rates include auto loans as low as 5.49% APR, certificates of deposit up to 3.46% APY, and boat loans from 7.64% APR.

WSFCU distinguishes itself through personalized member service, competitive electronic banking platforms, and community involvement evidenced by their regular financial education seminars, charitable donations to local schools, and community events like Shred Day and car shows. The credit union emphasizes member education with content on topics ranging from credit scores and debt consolidation to phishing scam prevention and tax return planning.

As a federal credit union (NCUA-insured), WSFCU is subject to stricter regulatory oversight than traditional banks, which generally translates to consumer protections and member-focused governance. However, membership typically requires living or working in specific service areas, and loan approval remains subject to credit review with stated restrictions and disclaimers.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.49% APR for new vehicles
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle
Multiple convenient branch locations with drive-through service and Saturday hours
On-site ATMs at all listed branches for member access
NCUA insurance protection on deposits (federal credit union status)
Strong community engagement with regular educational seminars and charitable donations
Certificate of deposit rates up to 3.46% APY
cons: Membership eligibility restricted to specific service areas (Tulsa, Oklahoma region only)
All loan rates subject to change without notice and credit approval requirements
Limited geographic footprint with only 3 named branch locations
Money market rates relatively low at 1.20% APY compared to some online banks
Website contains incomplete information (branch listing cuts off mid-page)
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto and boat financing within Tulsa service area
Members wanting high-yield checking with cash back rewards and personalized service
Community-focused savers prioritizing NCUA insurance protection and member-owned governance
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents within their service area who prioritize competitive auto lending rates and cash-back checking rewards paired with community-focused, personalized service. The main caveat is that membership is geographically restricted to the Tulsa region, and like all credit unions, loan approval depends on individual credit qualification.
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
